data.title: GREEN: Implement ticket-migrate-brainstorm-tags.sh
data.description: Create plugins/dso/scripts/ticket-migrate-brainstorm-tags.sh. Accepts --target <host-project-root> and --repo-root <plugin-root> flags. Behavior: (1) plugin-source-repo guard: if target IS the plugin repo, exit 0 with notice; (2) marker check: if .claude/.brainstorm-tag-migration-v1 exists, exit 0 immediately; (3) iterate open epics via ticket list --type=epic --status=open; (4) for each epic: read description AND comment event files (grep for '### Planning Intelligence Log'); (5) on match: read-merge-write via ticket show -> add brainstorm:complete -> ticket edit --tags=; skip if already tagged; (6) on no match: print UNMATCHED: <epic-id> to stdout; (7) write marker file .claude/.brainstorm-tag-migration-v1; exit 0. Follow read-merge-write pattern from design-approve.sh. testing_mode: GREEN
